pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API dependency from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 10 / Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 10 require the jakarta.servlet namespace; using javax.servlet causes compile errors due to missing classes or package conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Annotation API dependency from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 10 / Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 10 require the jakarta.annotation namespace; using javax.annotation causes compile errors due to missing classes or package conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-war-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s02/Timer.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code using javax imports will fail to compile due to missing classes.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s10/BuyNu.general_idea: Replace session.invalidate() with request.logout() to use the standard Servlet 6.0 API for logging out users.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s10/BuyNu.why_exists: session.invalidate() does not log out the user in modern Servlet containers; request.logout() is the correct API for user logout.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using the old Java EE namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors due to missing javax.servlet classes.
